languages.text: "О, Блаженный мир, тающий в жарких объятиях Ноллы! Сыны и дочери Гордости Сантиэля славились набожностью и трудолюбием, а правил нами Великий Губернатор Фабрис VI Зауэрбэк, и сто умнейших людей — Великий Совет — помогали ему вести мир к процветанию!"

traits.locale_text: "О, Блаженный мир, тающий в жарких объятиях Ноллы! Сыны и дочери Гордости Сантиэля славились набожностью и трудолюбием, а правил нами Великий Губернатор Фабрис VI Зауэрбэк, и сто умнейших людей — Великий Совет — помогали ему вести мир к процветанию!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "O blessed world, basking in Nolla's fiery embrace! The sons of daughters of Santiel's Pride were renowned for their hard work and piety, ruled over by Supreme Governor Fabris VI Sauerback and a hundred of the wisest men, the Grand Council, who helped him usher the world to prosperity!"
languages.original_text: "О, Блаженный мир, тающий в жарких объятиях Ноллы! Сыны и дочери Гордости Сантиэля славились набожностью и трудолюбием, а правил нами Великий Губернатор Фабрис VI Зауэрбэк, и сто умнейших людей — Великий Совет — помогали ему вести мир к процветанию!"

traits.locale_text: "O blessed world, basking in Nolla's fiery embrace! The sons of daughters of Santiel's Pride were renowned for their hard work and piety, ruled over by Supreme Governor Fabris VI Sauerback and a hundred of the wisest men, the Grand Council, who helped him usher the world to prosperity!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "O gesegnete Welt, die sich in Nollas feuriger Umarmung sonnt! Die Söhne und Töchter von Santiels Stolz waren berühmt für ihren Fleiß und ihre Frömmigkeit, regiert vom Obersten Gouverneur Fabris VI Sauerback und hundert der weisesten Männer, dem Großen Rat, die ihm halfen, die Welt zum Wohlstand zu führen!"
languages.original_text: "O blessed world, basking in Nolla's fiery embrace! The sons of daughters of Santiel's Pride were renowned for their hard work and piety, ruled over by Supreme Governor Fabris VI Sauerback and a hundred of the wisest men, the Grand Council, who helped him usher the world to prosperity!"

languages.text: "Ô monde béni, baignant dans l'étreinte ardente de Nolla ! Les fils et les filles de la Fierté de Santiel étaient réputés pour leur travail acharné et leur piété. Le gouverneur suprême Fabris VI Sauerback et une centaine d'hommes parmi les plus sages, le Grand Conseil, les aidaient à mener le monde vers la prospérité.
languages.original_text: "O blessed world, basking in Nolla's fiery embrace! The sons of daughters of Santiel's Pride were renowned for their hard work and piety, ruled over by Supreme Governor Fabris VI Sauerback and a hundred of the wisest men, the Grand Council, who helped him usher the world to prosperity!"

languages.text: "哦，幸福的世界，沐浴在诺拉火热的怀抱中！桑提尔之傲的儿女们以勤劳和虔诚闻名于世 由最高总督法布里斯六世-绍尔贝克和百名最睿智的人组成的大议会统治着
languages.original_text: "O blessed world, basking in Nolla's fiery embrace! The sons of daughters of Santiel's Pride were renowned for their hard work and piety, ruled over by Supreme Governor Fabris VI Sauerback and a hundred of the wisest men, the Grand Council, who helped him usher the world to prosperity!"

languages.text: "¡Oh bendito mundo, que se regodea en el ardiente abrazo de Nolla! Los hijos de las hijas del Orgullo de Santiel eran famosos por su laboriosidad y piedad, gobernados por el Gobernador Supremo Fabris VI Sauerback y un centenar de los hombres más sabios, el Gran Consejo, ¡que le ayudaron a llevar el mundo a la prosperidad!"
languages.original_text: "O blessed world, basking in Nolla's fiery embrace! The sons of daughters of Santiel's Pride were renowned for their hard work and piety, ruled over by Supreme Governor Fabris VI Sauerback and a hundred of the wisest men, the Grand Council, who helped him usher the world to prosperity!"

languages.text: "祝福された世界よ、ノーラの燃えるような抱擁を浴びながら！サンティエル・プライドの娘たちの息子たちは勤勉と信心深さで名を馳せ、最高総督ファブリス6世ザウアバックと100人の賢者たち、太政官によって統治され、世界を繁栄へと導いていた！"
languages.original_text: "O blessed world, basking in Nolla's fiery embrace! The sons of daughters of Santiel's Pride were renowned for their hard work and piety, ruled over by Supreme Governor Fabris VI Sauerback and a hundred of the wisest men, the Grand Council, who helped him usher the world to prosperity!"

languages.text: "Ey Nolla'nın ateşli kucağında güneşlenen kutsanmış dünya! Santiel'in Gururu'nun kızlarının oğulları, Yüce Vali Fabris VI Sauerback ve onun dünyayı refaha kavuşturmasına yardım eden en bilge yüz adam, Büyük Konsey tarafından yönetilen, çalışkanlıkları ve dindarlıklarıyla ünlüydü!"
languages.original_text: "O blessed world, basking in Nolla's fiery embrace! The sons of daughters of Santiel's Pride were renowned for their hard work and piety, ruled over by Supreme Governor Fabris VI Sauerback and a hundred of the wisest men, the Grand Council, who helped him usher the world to prosperity!"
